prompt_text: Gao Lingning, a tall elegant young Chinese noblewoman in historical hanfu, pale skin, sharp almond eyes, straight dark brows, black hair in a neat low bun with jade hairpin, cold restrained expression, faint scar on her neck, slim but resilient figure, muted white and dark teal silk robes, aristocratic yet wounded aura, sits in stillness on the right side of the frame, half-turned toward camera, gazing into empty space with tense neck and shoulder lines, as if she has been sitting for a very long time and has not fully returned to herself yet.
